zh.lifeSummary: Alexander De Cruwys是Robert de Cruwys, Lord of Cruwys Morchard的兒子，於大約1210年出生在英國戴文可盧斯 莫爾哈德。他於1230年之前與Miss De Lohereng在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1280年在他的家鄉享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alexander De Cruwys是Robert de Cruwys, Lord of Cruwys Morchard的儿子，于大约1210年出生在英国戴文可盧斯 莫爾哈德。他于1230年之前与Miss De Lohereng在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1280年在他的家乡享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cruwys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cruse
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name probably from an unidentified place in Normandy named with Old French crues, crus, creus ‘hollow’. Creuse (in Somme, Picardy) and Cruys-Straëte (formerly in Flanders, now in the French département of Nord), which have the same etymology, are alternative possibilities but seem less likely on geographical and tenurial grounds.
English: perhaps a nickname from Middle English crus(e) ‘bold, fierce’, although the regular development would be to Crowse (rhyming with house).

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Alexander De Cruwys was born about 1210, in Cruwys Morchard, Devon, England as the son of Robert de Cruwys, Lord of Cruwys Morchard. He married Miss De Lohereng before 1230, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1280, in his hometown, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Alexander De Cruwys est né environ 1210, à Cruwys Morchard, Devon, Angleterre, fils de Robert de Cruwys, Lord of Cruwys Morchard. Il a épousé Miss De Lohereng avant 1230, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1280, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander De Cruwysは約1210年にイギリスデボンクルウイス モーチャードでRobert de Cruwys, Lord of Cruwys Morchardの息子として生まれた。1230年以前にヨーロッパでMiss De Loherengと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1280年に故郷で71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander De Cruwys(은)는 대략 1210년 영국 데폰 크루w이스 모르처드에서 Robert de Cruwys, Lord of Cruwys Morchard의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1230년 이전 우럽에서 Miss De Lohereng(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1280년 그의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Alexander De Cruwys родился около 1210 г. в местности крувис морчард, девон, Англия. Его отца звали Robert de Cruwys, Lord of Cruwys Morchard. Он женился на женщине по имени Miss De Lohereng перед 1230 г. в местности Европа. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1280 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 71 год.
